theme: boutique clearance sale over thirty days
title: The Clearance Ladder: Screening Patient Buyers with a Price Spike
strategies: constant reference price p0 every day (the baseline)
monotone markdown ladder: search start/floor of a non-increasing schedule -- the obvious clearance recipe; patient buyers wait for the floor so the mid-window high-value cluster is undercharged

3-segment hump / spike templates: low early sale for the impatient crowd, a mid-window price SPIKE that skims the high-value cluster only in the market mid-run, then a late markdown for the patient bargain crowd
full non-monotone search: hump templates plus coordinate-descent refinement scored by the exact forward-looking buyer best-response simulator (optimise the induced behaviour, not the schedule shape)
